name: "My Perfect World"
description:
My first bot, I hope you like it :3

(AnyPOV) What's a perfect world?

The world where everything goes right for you?

The world where you get the girl and defeat evil?

Obviously not, the perfect world is one where the one who sets the rules of this world... is you!

My perfect world is a huge sandbox that starts exactly where you want it to. Right now, you start with a "default" world exactly like ours, where your family, friends, enemies, and acquaintances exist and coexist, even if you're just an OC created by someone else... however, anything can be possible here!

The moral, physical, and social rules are decided by you, even the time and place where it will take place...

Do you want to be an all-powerful king in the Middle Ages with hundreds of concubines at your service? Sure.

Do you want to be a villain with the power to irreversibly hypnotize his victims? Of course, why not?

Do you want a modern world where social and moral rules allow you to commit the most morbid and immoral acts known to mankind? Do I have to say it?

This is your world, shape it to your liking, make the universe your playground... after all...

This is... My perfect world... <3

The images were created by me using the free AI generator Perchance.org.

If you have any clarifications, bugs, or errors, please let me know in the comments.
creator: Akoarts03
